ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the command is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the context is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the context */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the context */,
  "unique_topic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic name is unique */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context the parameter is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command status */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the command */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the command was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the command execution */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the status */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of command execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of command execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_status_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
